uin_code.source_quote: Product Name: Health Companion | Product UIN: MAXHLIP21509V042021

min_entry_age.source_quote: Dependent child entry standard 91 days (per Policy Schedule)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry per Policy Schedule (Health Companion: 18+ years, no max entry cap per IRDAI revised norms)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured options per Policy Schedule (Variant 1/2/3 + Family First; SI grid typically 3L/5L/7.5L/10L/15L/20L/25L/50L)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period applies to illness (standard IRDAI Excl03)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-existing Diseases (Code-Excl01) ... excluded until the expiry of 36 months (under Variant 2, Variant 3 Plans and Family First Policy)/ 48 months (under Variant 1 Plan) of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure Waiting Period (Code- Excl02): ... excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity Expense defined; not a base benefit of Health Companion (optional via maternity rider)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: We will not be liable to pay Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses for more than 30 days immediately

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: We will not be liable to pay Post-hospitalization Medical Expenses for more than 60 days immediately

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatment defined per IRDAI Standard Definition

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH treatment covered up to Sum Insured (standard Niva Bupa inclusion)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expense defined; excluded in base (optional add-on)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity excluded in base; newborn linked to maternity

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ donor expenses covered (standard Niva Bupa inclusion)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: No Claim Bonus means an increase to the Base Sum Insured in accordance with the provisions of Section 3.11 (rate per claim-free year per Policy Schedule, typically 20%; max accumulated 100%)

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Sum Insured means the total of the Base Sum Insured, re-fill amount as per Section 3.12 and No Claim Bonus as per Section 3.11

room_rent_capping.value: Per Policy Schedule (Variant-dependent: Single Private AC Room or higher)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent means the amount charged (per Policy Schedule)

copayment_pct.source_quote: No mandatory base copay (voluntary copay options per Policy Schedule)

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: Niva Bupa Health Companion: 30/60 pre/post hospitalization (shorter than ReAssure 2.0's 60/180). 3 Variants with PED varying 36/48 months.
